Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class UpdateApplication

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.UpdateApplication
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Operator, SVSubstitute, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
public final class UpdateApplication extends Object
Singleton class defining a binary operator {u}t that applies updates u to terms, formulas, or other updates t.

  • Field Details

    • UPDATE_APPLICATION

      public static final UpdateApplication UPDATE_APPLICATION

  • Method Details

    • sort

      public Sort sort(ImmutableArray<Term> terms)
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Determines the sort of the Term if it would be created using this Operator as top level operator and the given terms as sub terms. The assumption that the constructed term would be allowed is not checked.
      Parameters:
      terms - an array of Term containing the subterms of a (potential) term with this operator as top level operator
      Returns:
      sort of the term with this operator as top level operator of the given substerms

    • additionalValidTopLevel

      public void additionalValidTopLevel(Term term)
      Allows subclasses to impose custom demands on what constitutes a valid term using the operator represented by the subclass.

    • updatePos

      public static int updatePos()
      Returns:
      the index of the subterm representing the update being applied

    • getUpdate

      public static Term getUpdate(Term t)
      Parameters:
      t - term with this operator as top level operator
      Returns:
      the subterm representing the update being applies

    • targetPos

      public static int targetPos()
      Returns:
      the index of the subterm representing the formula/term/update that the update is applied to

    • getTarget

      public static Term getTarget(Term t)
      Parameters:
      t - term with this operator as top level operator
      Returns:
      the subterm representing the formula/term the update is applied to

    • whereToBind

      protected final ImmutableArray<Boolean> whereToBind()

      public final boolean isRigid()
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Tells whether the operator is rigid.

    • validTopLevelException

      public void validTopLevelException(Term term) throws TermCreationException
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognise

    • toString

      public String toString()

      toString in class Object
